textos.texto: On Monday I get up at six and I go to work by bus. On Tuesday I have a French class at half past seven in the evening. On Wednesday I always clean my house. On Thursday I go shopping and I buy new clothes. On Friday I have dinner with my family at eight o'clock. On the weekend I rest at home and I read books.

preguntas.enunciado: El martes tiene clase de francés.
¿A qué hora es la clase de francés?

textos.texto: This is my bedroom. It is small but nice. There is a bed, a table and a chair. On the table there is a red book and a black phone. Near the window there is a blue chair. My clothes are in the bedroom too: a green t-shirt and white shoes. My room is very nice.

preguntas.enunciado: Hay un libro rojo en la mesa.
